Experiment impact-of-nursery-size

Configuration & Queries Used: 

  {
    "slug": "impact-of-nursery-size",
    "histograms": {
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_ms": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "Time in milliseconds from navigationStart to loadEventStart for the foreground http or https root content document.",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.time_to_first_interaction_ms": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "Time in milliseconds from the first non-blank paint to the creation time of the next click, key, mouse or scroll event per top-level content browsing context.",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_first_contentful_paint_ms": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "The time between navigationStart and the first contentful paint of a foreground http or https root content document, in milliseconds. The contentful paint timestamp is taken during display list building and does not include rasterization or compositing of that paint.",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.js_pageload_execution_ms": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "Time spent during page load executing Javascript in ms.",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.histograms.memory_total": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "Total Memory Across All Processes (KB)",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.input_event_response_ms": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "Time (ms) from the Input event being created to the end of it being handled",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.cycle_collector_max_pause": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "Longest pause for an individual slice of one cycle collection, including preparation (ms)",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_max_pause_ms_2": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "Longest GC slice in a GC (ms)",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_ms": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "Time spent running JS GC (ms)",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_minor_us": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "Time spent running JS minor GC (us)",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_minor_reason": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "Reason (enum value) for initiating a minor GC",

                58,
                59,
                60,
                61,
                62,
                63,
                64,
                65,
                66,
                67,
                68,
                69,
                70,
                71,
                72,
                73,
                74,
                75,
                76,
                77,
                78,
                79,
                80,
                81,
                82,
                83,
                84,
                85,
                86,
                87,
                88,
                89,
                90,
                91,
                92,
                93,
                94,
                95,
                96,
                97,
                98,
                99,
                100
            ]
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_mark_ms": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "Time spent running JS GC mark phase (ms)",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_mark_rate_2": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "The number of objects marked per ms during GC.",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_sweep_ms": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "Time spent running JS GC sweep phase (ms)",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_slice_count": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "The number of slices in an incremental GC for the main runtime",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_slice_was_long": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "Whether a GC slice took 1.5 times or 5ms more than its budget",
            "kind": "categorical",
            "labels": [
                "no",
                "yes"
            ]
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_budget_overrun": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "How long a GC slice ran over its budget in microseconds",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_budget_was_increased": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "Whether the budget was increased due to taking too long or approaching the incremental limit",
            "kind": "categorical",
            "labels": [
                "no",
                "yes"
            ]
        }
    },
    "pageload_event_metrics": {
        "fcp_time": {
            "desc": "Time between firstContentfulPaint and navigationStart, in ms.",
            "min": 0,
            "max": 10000
        },
        "lcp_time": {
            "desc": "Time between largestContentfulPaint and navigationStart, at the point of onLoad firing, in ms. This may differ from the final LCP value as reported through the LCP histogram.",
            "min": 0,
            "max": 30000
        },
        "load_time": {
            "desc": "Time between loadEventStart and navigationStart, in ms.",
            "min": 0,
            "max": 30000
        },
        "response_time": {
            "desc": "Time between responseStart and navigationStart, in ms.",
            "min": 0,
            "max": 10000
        },
        "js_exec_time": {
            "desc": "Time spent executing JS during page load, in ms.",
            "min": 0,
            "max": 10000
        }
    },
    "segments": {
        "All": [],
        "Windows": [],
        "Linux": [],
        "Mac": []
    },
    "is_experiment": true,
    "startDate": "2024-03-20",
    "endDate": "2024-04-05",
    "channel": "beta",
    "branches": [
        {
            "name": "control"
        },
        {
            "name": "64mb"
        },
        {
            "name": "8mb"
        },
        {
            "name": "32mb"
        }
    ]
}
  

  with eventdata as (
SELECT
  normalized_os as segment,
  mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "impact-of-nursery-size").branch as branch,
  SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'fcp_time') AS int) AS fcp_time,
FROM
  `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload`
CROSS JOIN
  UNNEST(events) AS event
WHERE
  normalized_channel = "beta"
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-03-20')
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-04-05')  
  AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "impact-of-nursery-size").branch is not null
)
SELECT
  segment,
  branch,
  fcp_time as bucket,
  COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
  eventdata
WHERE
  fcp_time >= 0 AND fcp_time <= 10000
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with eventdata as (
SELECT
  normalized_os as segment,
  mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "impact-of-nursery-size").branch as branch,
  SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'lcp_time') AS int) AS lcp_time,
FROM
  `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload`
CROSS JOIN
  UNNEST(events) AS event
WHERE
  normalized_channel = "beta"
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-03-20')
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-04-05')  
  AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "impact-of-nursery-size").branch is not null
)
SELECT
  segment,
  branch,
  lcp_time as bucket,
  COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
  eventdata
WHERE
  lcp_time >= 0 AND lcp_time <= 30000
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with eventdata as (
SELECT
  normalized_os as segment,
  mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "impact-of-nursery-size").branch as branch,
  SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'load_time') AS int) AS load_time,
FROM
  `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload`
CROSS JOIN
  UNNEST(events) AS event
WHERE
  normalized_channel = "beta"
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-03-20')
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-04-05')  
  AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "impact-of-nursery-size").branch is not null
)
SELECT
  segment,
  branch,
  load_time as bucket,
  COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
  eventdata
WHERE
  load_time >= 0 AND load_time <= 30000
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with eventdata as (
SELECT
  normalized_os as segment,
  mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "impact-of-nursery-size").branch as branch,
  SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'response_time') AS int) AS response_time,
FROM
  `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload`
CROSS JOIN
  UNNEST(events) AS event
WHERE
  normalized_channel = "beta"
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-03-20')
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-04-05')  
  AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "impact-of-nursery-size").branch is not null
)
SELECT
  segment,
  branch,
  response_time as bucket,
  COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
  eventdata
WHERE
  response_time >= 0 AND response_time <= 10000
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with eventdata as (
SELECT
  normalized_os as segment,
  mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "impact-of-nursery-size").branch as branch,
  SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'js_exec_time') AS int) AS js_exec_time,
FROM
  `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload`
CROSS JOIN
  UNNEST(events) AS event
WHERE
  normalized_channel = "beta"
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-03-20')
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-04-05')  
  AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "impact-of-nursery-size").branch is not null
)
SELECT
  segment,
  branch,
  js_exec_time as bucket,
  COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
  eventdata
WHERE
  js_exec_time >= 0 AND js_exec_time <= 10000
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "impact-of-nursery-size").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-03-20')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-04-05')
        AND normalized_channel = "beta"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_ms is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "impact-of-nursery-size").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "impact-of-nursery-size").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.time_to_first_interaction_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-03-20')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-04-05')
        AND normalized_channel = "beta"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.time_to_first_interaction_ms is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "impact-of-nursery-size").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "impact-of-nursery-size").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_first_contentful_paint_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-03-20')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-04-05')
        AND normalized_channel = "beta"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_first_contentful_paint_ms is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "impact-of-nursery-size").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,

FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket

        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "impact-of-nursery-size").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.cycle_collector_max_pause, '$.values') as hist

        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-04-05')

        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "impact-of-nursery-size").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_mark_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-03-20')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-04-05')
        AND normalized_channel = "beta"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_mark_ms is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "impact-of-nursery-size").branch is not null

keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key

SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "impact-of-nursery-size").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_mark_rate_2, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-03-20')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-04-05')
        AND normalized_channel = "beta"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_mark_rate_2 is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "impact-of-nursery-size").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "impact-of-nursery-size").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_sweep_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-03-20')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-04-05')
        AND normalized_channel = "beta"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_sweep_ms is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "impact-of-nursery-size").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "impact-of-nursery-size").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_slice_count, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-03-20')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-04-05')
        AND normalized_channel = "beta"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_slice_count is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "impact-of-nursery-size").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "impact-of-nursery-size").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_slice_was_long, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-03-20')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-04-05')
        AND normalized_channel = "beta"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_slice_was_long is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "impact-of-nursery-size").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "impact-of-nursery-size").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_budget_overrun, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-03-20')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-04-05')
        AND normalized_channel = "beta"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_budget_overrun is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "impact-of-nursery-size").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "impact-of-nursery-size").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_budget_was_increased, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-03-20')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-04-05')
        AND normalized_channel = "beta"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_budget_was_increased is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "impact-of-nursery-size").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
